patches.description: Always opens Gboard in incognito mode to disable typing history collection and personalization.
patches.name: Always-incognito mode for Gboard

patches.description: Blocks ads, trackers, analytics, and unwanted content in apps and games using a hosts file.
patches.name: Block ads, trackers, and analytics

options.description: The hosts file containing hosts or domains you want to block, one per line.
options.title: Hosts file

options.description: The IP address to redirect blocked domains to. This will be used with your hosts list to block content.
options.title: Redirection IP

patches.description: Bypasses the signature verification checks when the app starts up. It is recommended to use the unmodified app to work properly.
patches.name: Bypass signature verification checks

options.description: The package name of the app, if modified. This must match the package name defined when the 'Change package name' patch is selected or as defined in the AndroidManifest.xml.
options.title: Package name

options.description: The base64-encoded signature from the original, unmodified APK. This extracts the certificate/signature in the APK by default.
options.title: Base64-encoded signature

patches.description: Appends ".revanced" to the package name by default. Changing the package name of the app can lead to unexpected issues.
patches.name: Change package name

options.description: The name of the package to rename the app to.
options.title: Package name

options.description: Update compatibility receiver permissions. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.
options.title: Update permissions

options.description: Update other permissions declared by the app. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.
options.title: Update other permissions

options.description: Update content provider URI authorities. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.
options.title: Update content providers

patches.description: Deactivates Firebase Analytics and removes its associated broadcast receivers and services.
patches.name: Deactivate Firebase Analytics

patches.description: Deactivates the collection of performance data on app start up time, network requests, and other related metrics.
patches.name: Deactivate Firebase Performance Monitoring

patches.description: Disables the Google Safe Browsing checks in WebView. This doesn't apply to WebView within the SDK Runtime.
patches.name: Disable Google Safe Browsing in WebView

patches.description: Disables the collection of diagnostic data or usage statistics that are uploaded to Google.
patches.name: Disable metrics collection in WebView

patches.description: Disables banner, interstitial, and other ad formats.
patches.name: Disable mobile ads

options.description: Disable App Open, Banner & MREC, Interstitial, Native, and Rewarded ad formats.
options.title: AppLovin MAX

options.description: Disable Banner, Native, Interstitial, Pop-up, Rewarded, and Splash ad formats.
options.title: BIGO

options.description: Disable Banner, Interstitial, Native, Rewarded, Rewarded Interstitial, and App Open ad formats.
options.title: Google AdMob

options.description: Disable Banner, Medium rectangle, Interstitial, Native, Native Banner, Rewarded Video, and Rewarded Interstitial ad formats.
options.title: Meta Audience Network

options.description: Disable Banner, Interstitial, Rewarded Video, Native, and Splash ad formats.
options.title: Mintegral

options.description: Disable Banner, Interstitial, Rewarded, Native, Native Banner, In-Stream Video and Audio, and Carousel ad formats.
options.title: myTarget

options.description: Disable Banner, Interstitial, Native, Rewarded Video, and App Open ad formats.
options.title: Pangle

options.description: Disable Banner, Interstitial, Native, Rewarded, and App Open ad formats.
options.title: TopOn

options.description: Disable Banner, Interstitial, Native, and Rewarded Video ad formats.
options.title: Unity

options.description: Disable Banner, Interstitial, Native, Rewarded, and App Open ad formats.
options.title: Liftoff Monetize

options.description: Disable Banner, Interstitial, Native, Rewarded, App Open, InStream, and Feed ad formats.
options.title: Yandex Advertising Network

patches.description: Disables the banner that shows up after taking a screenshot.
patches.name: Disable screenshot banner

patches.description: Enables clipboard support in incognito mode.
patches.name: Enable clipboard in incognito

patches.description: Enables OCR feature to extract text from images and insert it into text fields.
patches.name: Enable OCR feature for Gboard

patches.description: Enables undo feature to quickly undo or correct typing mistakes.
patches.name: Enable Undo feature for Gboard

patches.description: Hides the experimental Ask button (Reddit Answers) from the search bar.
patches.name: Hide Ask button from search bar

patches.description: Hides the community highlights section.
patches.name: Hide community highlights

patches.description: Hides the new experimental, prominent search bar on the main screen.
patches.name: Hide prominent search bar

patches.description: Hides the share count on Reddit posts.
patches.name: Hide share count

patches.description: Hides the scores on Reddit posts and comments.
patches.name: Hide upvote scores

options.description: Removes scores from posts in feeds and search results.
options.title: Hide post scores

options.description: Removes scores from comments in threads and search results.
options.title: Hide comment scores

patches.description: Opens external links directly without going through out.reddit.com.
patches.name: Open external links directly

patches.description: Removes ads and telemetry from Home, Popular, Watch, Latest, All, Custom feeds, Search, and Subreddits, including comments.
patches.name: Remove ads and telemetry

patches.description: Removes unnecessary internet permission from apps that can still work without internet access.
patches.name: Remove internet permission

patches.description: Unshortens and removes the tracking query parameters from shared links.
patches.name: Sanitize share links

patches.description: Spoofs the device's advertising ID with a string of zeros.
patches.name: Spoof Advertising ID

patches.description: Spoofs the app's package certificate hash used by Firebase Installations so that push notifications, remote config, and other Firebase services continue to work as expected.
patches.name: Spoof Firebase certificate hash

options.description: The SHA-1 hash of the app's package certificate.
options.title: Certificate hash

patches.description: Toggles Gboard feature flags to enable or disable experimental or hidden features.
patches.name: Toggle feature flags

options.description: The Gboard feature flags to toggle, such as experimental or hidden features.
options.title: Feature flags

options.description: Enables or disables all specified feature flags.
options.title: Enable feature flags
